title: Implement LCI message delivery receipt resource
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.14. The messaging contract is aligned on /msg/inbox for send/receive and /msg/sent for accepted sends, while spec/12-apps.md also defines POST /msg/ack for delivery/read/failure receipts. Implement the no-hardware Python CoAP resource/client handling for delivery receipts when the product wants local receipt support.
acceptance_criteria: Python CoAP resources expose /msg/ack only when receipt handling is configured; POST /msg/ack validates id/status/ts payloads and stores or dispatches receipts deterministically; /.well-known/core advertises /msg/ack only when mounted; LciClient/TUI behavior for delivery receipts is documented or tested; targeted no-hardware tests pass.
